steps.title: Use the example signal
steps.content: The previous sentence says many dinosaurs without wings also had feathers. The underlined sentence begins For instance and then names the wingless Ornithomimus as likely feathered.

steps.title: Identify the example
steps.content: A invents a scientific debate, B says the sentence criticizes a theory, and C claims researchers are identified, though none are named. The underlined sentence gives a specific case of the broader group just described. The answer is D.
